name: ObsidianPromptPreprocessor
description: Message preprocessor that injects explicit Obsidian note context into the system prompt without editing notes or searching the whole vault.
author: VCPstudio

OBSIDIAN_VAULT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the primary Obsidian vault.

OBSIDIAN_ALLOWED_VAULTS.description: Optional semicolon-separated absolute vault roots. The primary vault is always allowed.

OBSIDIAN_ACTIVE_NOTE.description: Optional active note path to inject.

OBSIDIAN_CONTEXT_NOTES.description: Optional semicolon-separated note paths to inject.

OBSIDIAN_CONTEXT_MAX_CHARS.description: Maximum total characters injected into the prompt.

OBSIDIAN_PREPROCESSOR_ENABLED.description: Set false to disable context injection.
